summary_en: Correction to 14 May 2026 support opinion on Gerbera Holdings' tender offer for MetalArt. Change in item ⑩: reference to 'bilateral contract' (二者間契約書) amended to 'shareholder agreement' (株主間契約). Tender price, share count, and acquisition terms unchanged from original filing.
title_en: Correction Notice: Opinion Supporting Gerbera Holdings Corporation's Tender Offer for MetalArt Corporation Shares and Recommendation to Tender
translation_en_brief: This is a correction notice (訂正) issued on 15 May 2026 by MetalArt Corporation regarding its support opinion filed on 14 May 2026 for the public tender offer by Gerbera Holdings Corporation. The correction addresses item ⑩ in section 3(6) of the tender offer preconditions (前提条件). The original filing referred to a 'bilateral contract' (二者間契約書) entered into by the offeror with Daihatsu Industries (ダイハツ工業); the corrected version changes this reference to a 'shareholder agreement' (株主間契約) between the same parties. This terminological change clarifies the nature of the legal agreement governing Daihatsu's commitment. The board's recommendation to shareholders to tender and all other material terms remain unchanged. The tender offer is conditioned on receipt of positive special committee advice, board unanimous approval, regulatory clearance, and financing confirmation.
